## Security checklist

- [ ] Threat model updated if architecture changed (`/tm-drift` clean)
- [ ] No secrets in code, env files, or test fixtures
- [ ] AuthN/AuthZ paths re-reviewed if touched
- [ ] Input validation on every new endpoint
- [ ] Audit log events emitted for any new sensitive action
